justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence and updates Spring Boot to 3.x with Java 21, but misses updating JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 in the test class (removes @RunWith but keeps public class instead of class, and doesn't show full JUnit 5 migration). The removal of unused imports like java.util.Date is good. The diff is coherent with no spurious changes.
